description_long: This is a large, C-shaped donut with a thick, soft-looking body covered in a smooth layer of pastel pink icing. The surface is decorated with colorful, elongated sprinkles in red, yellow, blue, and light blue, scattered generously across the top. The donut has a prominent bite taken out of one side, exposing a slightly textured, golden-brown interior. The icing appears matte and slightly puffy, with the sprinkles adding a playful, festive touch. The overall form is rounded and plush, with a wide central hole and a slightly irregular, hand-crafted appearance. There is no visible packaging or branding, and the donut is shown isolated against a plain background.
description: A large, C-shaped donut with pink icing and colorful sprinkles, featuring a visible bite mark and a soft, plush appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pink icing, colorful sprinkles, and the prominent bite taken out of the donut.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thickness of the donut and the layered icing, with a glimpse of the exposed interior.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full ring shape, more sprinkles, and the bite mark from a different angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile highlighting the donut's rounded edge and the even distribution of icing and sprinkles.
attribute_icing_type: Pink frosted icing with a smooth, matte finish and slightly puffy texture.
attribute_topping_type: Colorful elongated sprinkles in red, yellow, blue, and light blue.
attribute_placement_location: Isolated on a plain background, not placed on any surface or within any packaging.
